$comment: The ruleset config record (ADR-018 §4, gh #34): base names the built-in ruleset (must match the manifest's selector); config carries ONLY knobs that were already data — the badge stat-boost mapping, the field-move badge gates, the two stat-stage multiplier tables, and the high-crit move list. Absent keys fall back to the ruleset's built-in faithful defaults.

badge_stat_boosts.$comment: battle stat key (atk/def/spd/spc) -> the progression flag (badge) that boosts it in battle

field_move_badges.$comment: field move -> the progression flag (badge) required to use it outside battle

accuracy_stage_multipliers.$comment: stage (-6..6, string keys) -> the MoveHitTest accuracy/evasion scale factor
